description: US EPA Eco-SSL source-index pages and contaminant-specific PDF records to add to Zotero as metadata-only items. No PDFs or attachments are downloaded, uploaded, or stored in the repo.

item.title: Ecological Soil Screening Level
item.abstractNote: US EPA overview and reference-mining page for Ecological Soil Screening Levels, including links to guidance, literature identification resources, and interim Eco-SSL documents.
item.extra:
Matrix Options provenance source-index candidate.
Authority scope: international guidance.
Currentness status: official EPA page checked 2026-05-23; page shows last updated 2026-04-21.
Boundary: source-index page only; promote individual linked PDFs and exact locators for values.
No source files attached by this queue.
Source ID: src-us-epa-eco-ssl-overview-2026
